title: Demo 1: branching chain capture with the same final landing.
description:
Demo 1: branching chain capture with the same final landing.

The white pion on F4 has two capture sequences that both end on F8:
  1) F4 -> H6 -> F8   capturing G5, then G7
  2) F4 -> D6 -> F8   capturing E5, then E7

In the REPL, try:
  > f4 f8
The app lists the matching routes. Choose one with:
  > f4 f8 1
  > f4 f8 2
